Name: AGameMode
Description:
GameMode is a subclass of GameModeBase that behaves like a multiplayer match-based game.
  It has default behavior for picking spawn points and match state.
  If you want a simpler base, inherit from GameModeBase instead.

Variables.Name: MatchState
Variables.Description: What match state we are currently in

Variables.Name: bDelayedStart
Variables.Description: Whether the game should immediately start when the first player logs in. Affects the default behavior of ReadyToStartMatch

Variables.Name: NumBots
Variables.Description: number of non-human players (AI controlled but participating as a player).

Variables.Name: MinRespawnDelay
Variables.Description: Minimum time before player can respawn after dying.

Variables.Name: NumTravellingPlayers
Variables.Description: Number of players that are still traveling from a previous map

Variables.Name: EngineMessageClass
Variables.Description: Contains strings describing localized game agnostic messages.

Variables.Name: InactivePlayerArray
Variables.Description: PlayerStates of players who have disconnected from the server (saved in case they reconnect)

Variables.Name: bEnabelPawnPool
Variables.Description: Weather to enable Gamemode Pawn Pool

Variables.Name: InactivePlayerStateLifeSpan
Variables.Description: Time a playerstate will stick around in an inactive state after a player logout

Variables.Name: bHandleDedicatedServerReplays
Variables.Description: If true, dedicated servers will record replays when HandleMatchHasStartedHandleMatchHasStopped is called

Functions.Name: GetMatchState
Functions.Description: Returns the current match state, this is an accessor to protect the state machine flow

Functions.Name: IsMatchInProgress
Functions.Description: Returns true if the match state is InProgress or other gameplay state

Functions.Name: HasMatchEnded
Functions.Description: Returns true if the match state is WaitingPostMatch or later

Functions.Name: StartMatch
Functions.Description: Transition from WaitingToStart to InProgress. You can call this manually, will also get called if ReadyToStartMatch returns true

Functions.Name: EndMatch
Functions.Description: Transition from InProgress to WaitingPostMatch. You can call this manually, will also get called if ReadyToEndMatch returns true

Functions.Name: RestartGame
Functions.Description: Restart the game, by default travel to the current map

Functions.Name: AbortMatch
Functions.Description: Report that a match has failed due to unrecoverable error

Functions.Name: K2_OnSetMatchState
Functions.Description: Implementable event to respond to match state changes

Return.Description: True if ready to Start Match. Games should override this
true if ready to End Match. Games should override this

Functions.Name: Say
Functions.Description: Exec command to broadcast a string to all players

Functions.Name: SetBandwidthLimit
Functions.Description: Alters the synthetic bandwidth limit for a running game.
